summary:
An amputated finger must not have its ampulla discarded; instead, both need careful management as part of standard care procedures. Typically, such biomedical wastes are placed in red-colored bins due to their potential infection risk.
The colored bin used here refers specifically to \boxed{red}.
To clarify based directly from Agent’s response:

Red
This color corresponds most accurately according to common practices described by agents involved in this task. To ensure accuracy always refer back to specific local regulations if available but typically follows these general standards outlined above. ``` Summary: Amputated fingers require special handling including keeping intact with the limb until appropriate transfer occurs—typically placing them in designated red biohazard bags/waste receptacles per usual medical practice. Thus, broken ampulas go into red bins.\n\n``` Red ```
```

Final Answer Boxed:\(\boxed{\text{红}}\)（红色）。
这样总结了关键的临床要点，同时保持在两句话以内。注意将颜色翻译为中文以符合问题要求。

Translation Note：For clarity during translation, "red" has been translated literally as “红” while maintaining consistency across all responses provided earlier.)
